overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera follows the character along elevated pedestrian walkways past towering skyscrapers, industrial structures, and light traffic under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with towering neon billboards

events.description: camera pans left and begins moving forward along the green pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: player character starts walking along the elevated pedestrian path away from the intersection

entered.detail: tall building covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
futuristic glass tower reflecting sunlight in the distance
dense cluster of industrial structures with pipes and steam vents
elevated walkway with green surface and red borders
metal barrier separating pedestrian path from vehicle road

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a futuristic city intersection with towering neon billboards and glass skyscrapers visible in the distance. The camera turns left and begins following a pedestrian walkway, revealing an elevated green path bordered by railings with industrial buildings on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway alongside traffic with industrial buildings

events.description: black sports car drives past on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated path with vehicles passing by on the right

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car driving parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: concrete utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires
industrial pipes releasing white steam into the air

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the elevated green walkway with industrial buildings lining the left side. A black sports car passes by on the right as the path continues straight, with power lines and steam vents becoming prominent features of the industrial landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district walkway with dense urban structures

events.description: camera begins following a pedestrian with red hair walking ahead in the same direction

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with red hair and beige pants walking along the walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking in the same direction ahead of camera

entered.detail: large white satellite dishes mounted on building rooftops
massive concrete highway ramp rising into the sky
electrical equipment and air conditioning units on building sides

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the industrial district with satellite dishes visible on rooftops and an elevated highway structure looming ahead. The camera follows a pedestrian with red hair walking ahead, while other pedestrians walk in the same direction along the green pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway beneath elevated highway with concrete overpasses

events.description: entering shadow cast by overhead concrete overpass
passing under the concrete overpass structure into darker enclosed area

agents.ego_description: walking under the shadow of the overpass as the environment becomes more enclosed

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass casting shadows on the walkway
industrial scaffolding and support structures on building facades

segments.scene_description: The walkway enters the shadow of a massive concrete overpass, dramatically changing the lighting from bright sunlight to dappled shade. Metal scaffolding appears on the right while the industrial buildings continue on the left, creating a more enclosed urban canyon atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway under multi-level highway approaching crosswalk

events.description: approaching yellow zebra crosswalk markings under the overpass

agents.ego_description: approaching a crosswalk beneath the overpass while walking past a seated pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on a bench on the left side of the walkway

entered.detail: yellow zebra crossing markings on the green walkway surface
concrete bench where a pedestrian is seated
illuminated advertisements on the building walls under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Deep under the overpass, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The camera approaches a yellow zebra crosswalk while passing a pedestrian sitting on a bench. Neon signs illuminate the left wall as the concrete overpass structure dominates the sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open city intersection into the shadowed depths of a massive industrial overpass. It begins at a futuristic crossroads dominated by neon billboards and glass skyscrapers before turning left to follow an elevated green pedestrian walkway bordered by industrial buildings. As the camera proceeds, the landscape becomes more utilitarian with steam vents and power lines appearing, while a black sports car passes by and the path leads toward satellite dishes and a looming highway structure. The scene then shifts as the walkway enters the shadow of a concrete overpass, transitioning the lighting from bright sunlight to dappled shade amidst metal scaffolding and enclosed urban walls. Finally, the camera moves deep under the structure into a darker environment, passing a pedestrian on a bench and approaching a yellow zebra crosswalk illuminated by neon signs.
